6b:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Updating Mnemosyne"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Upgrade Mnemosyne and migrate data between versions."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["If you're on ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"v2.7"}]," and want the latest, jump to ",["$","a",null,{"href":"#upgrading-from-v27-to-v300","children":"Upgrading from v2.7 to v3.0"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Already on v3.0.x? See ",["$","a",null,{"href":"#upgrading-to-v31-shared-surface--multilingual-memoria","children":"Upgrading to v3.1"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Reference"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"What changed"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"User action"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"New PyPI release"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory"}]," + restart Hermes"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Source-only fix"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"git pull"}]," + restart Hermes"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"New dependency / entry point"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"git pull"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install -e ."}]," + restart Hermes"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"externally-managed-environment"}]," (Debian/Ubuntu)"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Use a venv or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install --break-system-packages"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite schema changed"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["See ",["$","a",null,{"href":"#how-to-confirm-schema-changes","children":"How to confirm schema changes"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"E6 TripleStore split (v2.8)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Auto-migrates on first init. Backup at ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{db}.pre_e6_backup"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"MEMORIA architecture (v3.0)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-creates 5 new tables on first init. No manual action needed"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"plugin.yaml"}]," / tool schema"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Restart Hermes only"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"PEP 668: externally-managed-environment on Debian / Ubuntu"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Debian 13 (and Ubuntu 24.04+) ship Python with PEP 668 protection. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," outside a virtualenv fails with:"]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"error: externally-managed-environment\n× This environment is externally managed\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Solution 1: Use a virtualenv (recommended)"}]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"python3 -m venv ~/mnemosyne-venv\nsource ~/mnemosyne-venv/bin/activate\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Make sure Hermes is configured to use this venv's Python."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Solution 2: pipx (for CLI tools)"}]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install pipx\npipx install mnemosyne-memory\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Solution 3: Override (quick fix, use with caution)"}]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory --break-system-packages","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"This bypasses the guard. Fine for personal machines or containers. Not recommended for shared/multi-app systems."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Upgrading from v2.7 to v3.0"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"This is the most common jump for existing users. It covers 3 releases worth of changes. Read the relevant sections in order:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"v2.7 → v2.8"}]," — E6 TripleStore split (schema migration)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"v2.8 → v2.9"}]," — MCP SDK 1.x compatibility (code only)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"v2.9 → v3.0"}]," — MEMORIA architecture (new tables)"]}],"\n"]}],"\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d","\n","$L2e","\n","$L2f","\n","$L30","\n","$L31","\n","$L32","\n","$L33","\n","$L34","\n","$L35","\n","$L36","\n","$L37","\n","$L38","\n","$L39","\n","$L3a","\n","$L3b","\n","$L3c","\n","$L3d","\n","$L3e","\n","$L3f","\n","$L40","\n","$L41","\n","$L42","\n","$L43","\n","$L44","\n","$L45","\n","$L46","\n","$L47","\n","$L48","\n","$L49","\n","$L4a","\n","$L4b","\n","$L4c","\n","$L4d","\n","$L4e","\n","$L4f","\n","$L50","\n","$L51","\n","$L52","\n","$L53","\n","$L54","\n","$L55","\n","$L56","\n","$L57","\n","$L58","\n","$L59","\n","$L5a","\n","$L5b","\n","$L5c","\n","$L5d","\n","$L5e","\n","$L5f","\n","$L60","\n","$L61","\n","$L62","\n","$L63","\n","$L64","\n","$L65","\n","$L66"],["$L67"],"$L68"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"R1fXx0_zISQsUtYxfGXRl"}
4:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Step-by-step"}]
5:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# 1. Update the package\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\n\n# (If PEP 668 blocks you, use --break-system-packages)\n# pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory --break-system-packages\n\n# 2. Restart Hermes to load the new plugin/tools\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# 3. Verify\nhermes mnemosyne version\n# Should show: 3.0.0\n\nhermes mnemosyne stats --global\n# Check memory count is preserved\n\nhermes tools list | grep mnemosyne\n# Should show 17+ tools","language":"bash"}]
6:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"What happens to your data on first run:"}]}]
7:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["v2.7 databases get auto-migrated by E6 on first BeamMemory init. Backup written to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{db}.pre_e6_backup"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["v3.0 creates 5 new MEMORIA tables (",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_facts"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_timelines"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_instructions"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_preferences"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_kg"}],") via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS"}],". Existing tables are untouched."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"All existing memories, triples, embeddings remain intact."}],"\n"]}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"If anything goes wrong:"}]}]
9:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Restore pre-E6 backup\ncp ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db.pre_e6_backup  ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\n\n# Roll back to v2.7\npip install 'mnemosyne-memory==2.7.0'\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
a:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Upgrading to v3.1 (Shared Surface & Multilingual MEMORIA)"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"The v3.1 release adds shared surface memory, multilingual MEMORIA, custom embedding endpoints, and many fixes."}]
c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"New capabilities"}]
d:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Shared surface memory."}]," Cross-agent shared persistence via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_shared_*"}]," tools. Each agent gets an isolated shared surface. Activate with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes memory surface"}]," commands."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Multilingual MEMORIA."}]," Language auto-detection for German, Russian, and Chinese. Extraction applies language-specific patterns based on detected input language."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Custom embedding endpoints."}]," Configure any OpenAI-compatible embedding provider via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"}]," (set to your own server URL). Jina model dimensions auto-detected."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["Deterministic ",["$","code",null,{"children":"get(id)"}],"."]}]," Direct memory retrieval by ID — no vector search, no ranking. Call ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.get(memory_id)"}]," for exact lookup."]}],"\n"]}]
e:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"New environment variables"}]
f:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it does"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Override the embedding API provider URL"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDINGS_VIA_API"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"not set"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Set to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]," to route all embedding models through the API"]}]]}]]}]]}]
10:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"What to verify after update"}]
11:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# Verify version\npython3 -c \"from mnemosyne import __version__; print(__version__)\"\n# Expected: 3.1.2","language":"bash"}]
12:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Rollback"}]
13:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"pip install 'mnemosyne-memory==3.0.0'\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":"Shared surface tables remain in the database but are ignored by v3.0.0."}]
15:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Upgrading to v3.1.1 / v3.1.2 (Patch Releases)"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":"These are additive patch releases — no schema changes, no manual steps."}]
17:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"v3.1.1"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":["Renames embedding env vars to the preferred convention (",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_URL"}]," / ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_KEY"}],"). The old names (",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_API_KEY"}],") still work as fallbacks."]}]
19:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
1a:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"v3.1.2"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Strict fact matching is now the default. If you relied on permissive matching (where any query word matched any stored fact), set ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LENIENT_FACT_MATCH=1"}]," to opt back in."]}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Other fixes: entity prefix similarity now requires 30% min length ratio, single-token strict fact queries (5+ chars, non-stopword) now match instead of being silently rejected."}]
1d:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Upgrade\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# If recall results seem too narrow after upgrade:\nexport MNEMOSYNE_LENIENT_FACT_MATCH=1\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
1e:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Schema Migrations"}]
1f:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses automatic schema migrations that run on first connection after upgrade. There is no manual ",["$","code",null,{"children":"migrate"}]," command."]}]
20:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Version"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Migration"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"1.0 → 2.0"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Schema upgrade"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add BEAM tiered memory, FTS5 indices"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.0 → 2.1"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Schema upgrade"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Add ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," to episodic"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.1 → 2.2"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Schema upgrade"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add temporal graph indexes"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.2 → 2.8 (E6)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"e6_triplestore_split"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Split ",["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}]," into ",["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"annotations"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.8 → 3.0 (MEMORIA)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-create"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["5 new tables (",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_facts"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_timelines"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_instructions"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_preferences"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_kg"}],")"]}]]}]]}]]}]
21:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L69",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Automatic Migrations"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses automatic schema migrations that run on first connection after an upgrade. There is no ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.migrate"}]," command. If migration fails, enable debug logging with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"logging.getLogger(\"mnemosyne\").setLevel(logging.DEBUG)"}],"."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
22:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Cross-Instance Migration"}]
23:["$","p",null,{"children":"Export from old instance, import to new using the Python SDK:"}]
24:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Export from old database\nold_mem = Mnemosyne(db_path=\"old.db\")\nold_mem.export_to_file(\"export.json\")\n\n# Import into new database\nnew_mem = Mnemosyne(db_path=\"new.db\")\nnew_mem.import_from_file(\"export.json\")\n\n# Verify\nprint(new_mem.stats())","language":"python"}]
25:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How to Confirm Schema Changes"}]
26:["$","p",null,{"children":"Wondering if an update changed the SQLite schema? Here's how to check."}]
27:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Before updating (baseline)"}]
28:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Dump the current schema\npython3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\nschema = conn.execute(\"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nfor row in schema:\n  print(row[0] + ';')\nconn.close()\n\" > ~/mnemosyne_schema_baseline.txt","language":"bash"}]
29:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"After updating (compare)"}]
2a:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Dump the new schema\npython3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\nschema = conn.execute(\"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nfor row in schema:\n  print(row[0] + ';')\nconn.close()\n\" > ~/mnemosyne_schema_new.txt\n\n# Compare\ndiff ~/mnemosyne_schema_baseline.txt ~/mnemosyne_schema_new.txt","language":"bash"}]
2b:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Quick check: what version was my DB created by?"}]
2c:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"python3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\ntables = conn.execute(\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nnames = [t[0] for t in tables]\nif 'memoria_facts' in names:\n  print('DB schema: v3.0+ (MEMORIA)')\nelif 'annotations' in names:\n  print('DB schema: v2.8+ (E6 TripleStore split)')\nelif 'episodic_memory' in names:\n  print('DB schema: v2.0+ (BEAM)')\nelse:\n  print('DB schema: v1.x (legacy)')\nconn.close()\n\"","language":"bash"}]
2d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"By Install Path"}]
2e:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"PyPI (recommended for users)"}]
2f:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
30:["$","p",null,{"children":"To verify the new version:"}]
31:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne version\nhermes mnemosyne stats --global\nhermes memory status","language":"bash"}]
32:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":["Source install (",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install -e ."}],")"]}]
33:["$","p",null,{"children":["For most updates, only ",["$","code",null,{"children":"git pull"}]," is required:"]}]
34:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"cd mnemosyne\ngit pull\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
35:["$","p",null,{"children":["Re-run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install -e ."}]," only when ",["$","code",null,{"children":"setup.py"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pyproject.toml"}]," added new dependencies, new entry points, or metadata changed."]}]
36:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Hermes MemoryProvider only"}]
37:["$","p",null,{"children":["This path symlinks ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/plugins/mnemosyne"}]," directly into the repo:"]}]
38:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"cd mnemosyne\ngit pull\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
39:["$","p",null,{"children":["No ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," needed."]}]
3a:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Database Migrations"}]
3b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS"}],", so most schema changes upgrade automatically."]}]
3c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run a migration script only when:"}]
3d:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"The CHANGELOG explicitly mentions a database schema change"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You are upgrading from a pre-2.0 version"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You see errors about missing columns or tables"}],"\n"]}]
3e:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Available migration scripts"}]
3f:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Script"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it does"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"scripts/migrate_from_legacy.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Migrates from v1.x ephemeral databases to the canonical v2+ path. Idempotent."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"scripts/migrate_triplestore_split.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Manual E6 migration (v2.8). Only needed if you set ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_MIGRATE=0"}],". Idempotent."]}]]}]]}]]}]
40:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"E6 TripleStore Split"}]
41:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart\n# Check logs for:\n#   \"E6: auto-migrated N annotation rows from triples -> annotations.\"","language":"bash"}]
42:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Manual migration (explicit control):"}]}]
43:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"export MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_MIGRATE=0\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# Preview\npython scripts/migrate_triplestore_split.py --dry-run\n\n# Apply\npython scripts/migrate_triplestore_split.py","language":"bash"}]
44:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"What to verify after E6 migration:"}]}]

4a:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Restore a database backup"}]
4b:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you have a DB backup from before the update:"}]
4c:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# E6 auto-backup\ncp ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db.pre_e6_backup  ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\n\n# Or any custom backup\ncp ~/backups/mnemosyne_20260101.db  ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db","language":"bash"}]
4d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Export, nuke, re-import"}]
4e:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Export current data\nhermes mnemosyne export --output ~/backup.json\n\n# Delete the database entirely\nrm ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\n\n# Start fresh with old version\npip install 'mnemosyne-memory==2.7.0'\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# Re-import\nhermes mnemosyne import --input ~/backup.json","language":"bash"}]
4f:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verifying an Update"}]
50:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Version check\nhermes mnemosyne version\n\n# Stats (memories preserved?)\nhermes mnemosyne stats --global\n\n# Tools registered?\nhermes tools list | grep mnemosyne\n\n# Memory available?\nhermes memory status\n\n# Schema version (for the curious)\npython3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\ntables = conn.execute(\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nprint(f'{len(tables)} tables: {[t[0] for t in tables]}')\nconn.close()\n\"","language":"bash"}]
51:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Troubleshooting"}]

53:["$","p",null,{"children":"Entry points are registered at install time, not at runtime. Re-run the install:"}]
54:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"pip install -e .","language":"bash"}]
55:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"\"No module named mnemosyne\" after update"}]

58:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Plugin changes not taking effect"}]
59:["$","p",null,{"children":"Hermes caches plugins at startup. You must restart:"}]
5a:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"hermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]

5d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Database errors after schema change"}]

5f:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Try auto-repair by restarting\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# If that fails, run the legacy migration\npython scripts/migrate_from_legacy.py\n\n# If errors persist, export, delete, re-import\nhermes mnemosyne export --output ~/backup.json\nrm ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\nhermes mnemosyne import --input ~/backup.json","language":"bash"}]

61:["$","p",null,{"children":["The E6 migration moves annotation rows from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}]," to a new ",["$","code",null,{"children":"annotations"}]," table. This does not delete memories."]}]
